comment: Curated operator-published aerodrome documents, attached to the matching airfield at build time. For countries without a freely redistributable AIP chart source (currently Switzerland: aerodrome charts exist only in the paid eVFR Manual). Rules: only documents the aerodrome operator publishes openly on its own website; attribute the operator in 'source'; NEVER simulator charts (IVAO/VATSIM are 'flight simulation use only') and never paid-manual extracts. 'updatedAt' is the operator's document date when known. Optional 'pages' (e.g. '22-26,49-52', 1-based) trims long documents to the in-flight essentials.
